sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi od pet stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second of the five pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «جُعِلَتْ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِي فِي الصَّلَاةِ» [رَوَاهُ النَّسَائِيُّ وَصَحَّحَهُ الأَلْبَانِيُّ فِي صَحِيحِ الْجَامِعِ، رَقْم ٣١٢٤].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Moja radost je učinjena u namazu' [Bilježi Nesai, a Albani ga je ocijenio vjerodostojnim u Sahih al-Džami', br. 3124].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'My delight has been placed in prayer' [Narrated by an-Nasa'i and authenticated by al-Albani in Sahih al-Jami', No. 3124].

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمُسْلِمُ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ النِّظَامَ وَالنَّظَافَةَ وَالصَّبْرَ.
sentences.translation: Musliman kroz namaz uči disciplinu, čistoću i strpljenje.
sentences.translationEn: Through prayer, a Muslim learns discipline, cleanliness, and patience.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ صِلَةٌ مُبَاشِرَةٌ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَرَبِّهِ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: To je direktna veza između roba i njegovog Gospodara svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: It is a direct connection between the servant and his Lord every day.

sentences.arabic: نُحَافِظُ عَلَى صَلَاتِنَا لِنَشْعُرَ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ فِي قُلُوبِنَا.
sentences.translation: Čuvamo svoj namaz kako bismo osjetili odmor i smirenost u našim srcima.
sentences.translationEn: We maintain our prayers to feel comfort and tranquility in our hearts.
